text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
choice_data_list: It's not like you to sigh like that.
It's not like you to sigh like that.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Ah! You're right! I have to be happy!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
...But still, my body can't fake it. I really do feel a
lot more tired than usual.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
If my physical condition's not great, my luck won't
be either! First, I need to get plenty of rest so I
can get my energy back!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It sounds like Copano Rickey is worn out. I should
probably adjust her race schedule.
